smooch.description: Wavetable oscillator (Smooch). smooch(\"bank\", freq, phase?, tablePos?).

delay_smp.description: Delay line (time in samples, direct control)

tap_delay.description: Tap delay with feedback chain (time in seconds)

tap_delay_ms.description: Tap delay with feedback chain (time in milliseconds)

tap_delay_smp.description: Tap delay with feedback chain (time in samples)

bitcrush.description: Bit depth and sample rate reducer

clamp.description: Clamp value between lo and hi

wrap.description: Wrap value between lo and hi

counter.description: Increment on rising edge of trig; reset to start (or 0) on rising edge of reset

stereo.description: Create stereo signal from mono or L/R pair

left.description: Extract left channel from stereo signal

right.description: Extract right channel from stereo signal

state.description: Allocate a persistent state cell with the given initial value

get.description: Read the current value of a state cell

set.description: Write a value to a state cell, returns the new value

map.description: Apply function to each element of array

reduce.description: Reduce array with binary function and initial value

zipWith.description: Combine two arrays element-wise with binary function

zip.description: Interleave two arrays: [a0, b0, a1, b1, ...]

take.description: Take first n elements from array

drop.description: Drop first n elements from array

range.description: Generate array [start, start±step, ...] toward end (exclusive); direction follows start/end, step defaults to 1

repeat.description: Repeat value n times: [v, v, ..., v]

rotate.description: Rotate array elements by n positions

shuffle.description: Deterministic random permutation of array; optional seed mixes into the path-derived seed

sort.description: Sort array in ascending order; reverse=true sorts descending

normalize.description: Scale array to [lo, hi] range (defaults to [0, 1])

poly.description: Polyphonic voice manager: allocates voices driven by a pattern input. Default 64 voices, max 128.

mono.description: Stereo-to-mono downmix (L+R)*0.5, or monophonic voice manager

spread.description: Force source to specific voice count (pad/truncate)

linspace.description: Generate n evenly spaced values from start to end; mode=\"linear\" (default), \"log\", or \"geom\"

random.description: Generate n random values in [min, max) (deterministic; defaults to [0, 1))

harmonics.description: Generate harmonic series; ratio>1 stretches partials (piano-like inharmonicity), <1 compresses

pat.description: Mini-notation pattern. Returns values based on cycle position.

value.description: Numeric scalar pattern (raw values, no mtof). Equivalent to v\"…\".

note.description: Note-name pattern (note names + MIDI ints both → Hz). Equivalent to n\"…\".

scalar.description: Cast a note/value/chord pattern to its primary value buffer as a Signal.

slow.description: Slow down pattern by factor (stretch time).

fast.description: Speed up pattern by factor (compress time).

bend.description: Set bend value on pattern events; reachable via e.bend.

aftertouch.description: Set aftertouch value on pattern events; reachable via e.aftertouch.

bank.description: Set sample bank for pattern events.

variant.description: Set sample variant for pattern events.

tune.description: Apply microtonal tuning context to a pattern.

early.description: Shift events earlier by amount cycles (wraps).

late.description: Shift events later by amount cycles (wraps).

palindrome.description: Play pattern forward then reversed (doubles cycle length).

compress.description: Squash pattern into [start, end) of cycle (silence elsewhere).

ply.description: Repeat each event n times within its slot.

linger.description: Keep first frac of pattern; loop it to fill the cycle.

zoom.description: Play only [start, end) portion of pattern, stretched to fill cycle.

segment.description: Sample pattern at n evenly-spaced points; emit n equal-duration events.

swing.description: Apply 1/3 swing on n-slice grid (default n=4).

swingBy.description: Apply swing of `amount` on n-slice grid (default n=4).

iter.description: Rotate pattern start by 1/n per cycle (forward).

iterBack.description: Rotate pattern start by 1/n per cycle (backward).

run.description: Pattern of integers 0..n-1 evenly distributed in cycle.

binary.description: Trigger pattern from binary representation of n (MSB first).

binaryN.description: Trigger pattern from low `bits` bits of n (zero-padded, MSB first).

anchor.description: Set anchor MIDI note for chord voicing (e.g., \"c4\").

voicing.description: Apply named voicing dictionary (close/open/drop2/drop3 or custom).

addVoicings.description: Register a custom voicing dictionary by name.

toggle.description: Boolean toggle. Click to flip between 0 and 1.

dropdown.description: Selection dropdown. Returns index (0, 1, ...) of selected option.

pianoroll.description: Attach piano roll visualization. Signal passes through unchanged.

oscilloscope.description: Attach oscilloscope visualization. Signal passes through unchanged.

waveform.description: Attach waveform visualization. Signal passes through unchanged.

spectrum.description: Attach spectrum analyzer visualization. Signal passes through unchanged.

waterfall.description: Attach scrolling spectrogram visualization. Signal passes through unchanged.
